name: adb_screencap_phone
description: Capture the connected phone screen to a PNG using adb exec-out screencap. Writes under artifacts/screenshots/ by default.

output_path.description: Optional absolute or repo-relative PNG path; default is artifacts/screenshots/phone-<timestamp>.png

android_serial.description: Optional ANDROID_SERIAL when multiple adb devices

suggested_invocation.notes: Omit output_path when optional; pass empty argv for default path.
